Docs.summary: Represents a HarfBuzz color value with BGRA byte ordering.

Docs.param: The packed color value in BGRA byte order (0xBBGGRRAA).

Docs.param: The alpha channel value (0–255), where 0 is fully transparent and 255 is fully opaque.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct with the specified color channel values.

Docs.summary: Returns the string representation of the color in #AARRGGBB hexadecimal format.
